'''satungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:aversiveness|aversiveness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-t-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:aversiveness|aversiveness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| satungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sætingith|sætingith]] || [[word:sætingij|sætingij]] || [[word:sætingish|sætingish]] || [[word:sætingi|sætingi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:satutunguth|satutunguth]] || [[word:satutunguj|satutunguj]] || [[word:satutungush|satutungush]] || [[word:satutungu|satutungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:satunguth|satunguth]] || [[word:satunguj|satunguj]] || [[word:satungush|satungush]] || [[word:satungu|satungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:satufnguth|satufnguth]] || [[word:satufnguj|satufnguj]] || [[word:satufngush|satufngush]] || [[word:satufnguf|satufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:satunguthu|satunguthu]] || [[word:satunguju|satunguju]] || [[word:satungushu|satungushu]] || [[word:satunguku|satunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:satunguth|satunguth]] || [[word:satunguj|satunguj]] || [[word:satungush|satungush]] || [[word:satungu|satungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:satunguthul|satunguthul]] || [[word:satungujul|satungujul]] || [[word:satungushul|satungushul]] || [[word:satungukul|satungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:satunguthuthu|satunguthuthu]] || [[word:satungujuju|satungujuju]] || [[word:satungushushu|satungushushu]] || [[word:satunguku|satunguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:satunguthun|satunguthun]] || [[word:satungujun|satungujun]] || [[word:satungushun|satungushun]] || [[word:satungukun|satungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:satunguthuoro|satunguthuoro]] || [[word:satungujuoro|satungujuoro]] || [[word:satungushuoro|satungushuoro]] || [[word:satungukuoro|satungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
